summary: Switched LLM response parsing from json_object to json_schema with strict: true to guarantee pure JSON output; added separate retry backoff: 15/30/60s for 429 rate limits vs 1/2/3s for transient errors; implemented CRITICAL git discipline rule: git commit FORBIDDEN without explicit /commit invocation, git push ALWAYS FORBIDDEN; enhanced _extract_json() to handle dialog-wrapped JSON responses from LLMs.
